dependencies: Reliance on foundries to provide silicon-based products and supplement gallium arsenide wafer manufacturing capacity
Dependence on subcontractors to package, assemble, and test certain products
Limited number of sole-source suppliers for certain raw materials and components
Dependence on suppliers for raw materials including gallium, germanium, antimony, and rare earth metals
Potential disruption of operations at third-party foundries and assembly/test facilities in Asia-Pacific region
risks: Lack of wafer supply, potential wafer shortages, and higher wafer prices
Limited ability to respond to unanticipated changes in customer demand
Limited control over delivery schedules, manufacturing yields, production costs, process technologies, and quality assurance
Inaccessibility of, or delays in obtaining access to, key process technologies, materials, and IP blocks
Third-party foundries may allocate limited capacity to other customers
Suppliers may experience financial difficulties or changes in control
Suppliers may be unable to deliver products in a timely manner
Suppliers may be unwilling to invest in processes that meet company needs
Supplier facilities may suffer damage or destruction, particularly in areas prone to natural disasters
Concentration risk in China for supply of critical materials
Geopolitical tensions involving China and Taiwan could disrupt operations of suppliers in Taiwan

regulatory_risks: International, federal, state, and local legislation and regulations relating to discharge of substances into the environment
Treatment, transport, and disposal of hazardous wastes
Recycling and product packaging requirements
Worker health and safety regulations
Environmental laws and worker health and safety laws compliance
Import/export controls, tariffs, and other trade-related regulations and restrictions
Export restrictions including Entity List restrictions on selling to certain Chinese entities
Restrictions on certain trade and other activities in China, Russia, Belarus, and portions of Ukraine
European Union Restriction of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Equipment (RoHS) Directive
Restrictions on use of per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS)
Conflict minerals regulations requiring determination of material origins
Climate change laws and regulations including restrictions on emissions of carbon dioxide or other greenhouse gases
Limitations or restrictions on water use
Energy management and waste management regulations
Mandatory and voluntary reporting, diligence, and disclosure on sustainability topics
Cybersecurity and privacy laws including China's cybersecurity and privacy laws
Tax laws and regulations changes including BEPS Project, Pillar One and Pillar Two, global corporate minimum tax
U.S. tax law changes including capitalization of research and development expenses
Inflation Reduction Act including corporate alternative minimum tax (CAMT) and excise tax on stock repurchases
CHIPS and Science Act funding and investment tax credit requirements
Spectrum allocation regulations for wireless technologies
FDA approval requirements for medical applications
Compliance with industry standards and customer sustainability initiatives
Workers' rights initiatives mandated by customers or industry groups

sanction_risks: U.S. government export restrictions on selling to certain Chinese entities on Entity List
Prohibitions on certain trade and other activities in China, Russia, Belarus, and portions of Ukraine
Potential restrictions on purchase of products made or containing technology or components from certain companies or from companies located in certain jurisdictions
Imposition by United States of tariffs on goods imported from China or deemed to be of Chinese origin
Countermeasures imposed by China in response to U.S. restrictions
China's expanded export restrictions on materials including gallium, germanium, antimony, and rare earth metals
Uncertainty regarding relationships among United States, China, Taiwan, Russia, Mexico, North Korea, Israel, other Middle Eastern countries, Japan, Singapore, and other foreign countries
Armed conflicts including conflict between Russia and Ukraine and conflicts in Israel and Middle Eastern region
Geopolitical tensions involving China and Taiwan that could disrupt operations of suppliers in Taiwan
